parameters.query:
SELECT t.id as task_id, t.term, l.city_name 
FROM search_queries t 
JOIN search_locations l ON t.id = l.search_id 
WHERE t.is_executed = FALSE 
ORDER BY t.priority_order ASC, t.created_at ASC 
LIMIT 1;

parameters.pythonCode:
output = []
task_data = _node["Get Next Task"].json
term = task_data.get("term", "").lower()

for item in _input.all():
    data = item.json
    score = 0.0
    suggestions = []
    
    # 1. Identificación de Nicho
    niche = "General"
    if any(word in term for word in ["aduana", "logistica", "flete"]): niche = "Agencia Aduanal"
    elif any(word in term for word in ["medico", "clinica", "dental"]): niche = "Salud"
    elif any(word in term for word in ["casa", "venta", "real estate", "condo"]): niche = "Real Estate"
    
    # 2. Lógica de Triggers de Venta
    if not data.get('website'):
        suggestions.append({
            "service": "AI-WhatsApp Concierge",
            "reason": "El negocio no tiene sitio web; un bot de WhatsApp puede capturar leads directamente."
        })
        
    rating = float(data.get('rating', 0))
    reviews = int(data.get('user_ratings_total', 0))
    if rating >= 4.5 and reviews > 30:
        score += 0.3
        suggestions.append({
            "service": "Review Responder AI",
            "reason": "Excelente reputación detectada. Ideal para automatizar respuestas."
        })

    # 3. Consolidación
    data['task_id'] = task_data['task_id']
    data['niche_category'] = niche
    data['relevance_score'] = round(score, 2)
    data['sales_suggestions'] = suggestions
    data['is_high_quality'] = score >= 0.6
    output.append(data)

return output

parameters.query: =UPDATE search_queries SET is_executed = TRUE WHERE id = '{{ $node["Get Next Task"].json["task_id"] }}';
